---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement for SpectrumCircle
title: "[FEATURE] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: raed06
---

## 💡 Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing. -->


## 🧩 Problem It Solves
<!-- What problem or limitation does this address? Why is it needed? -->
<!-- Example: "Currently, users cannot... which means..." -->


## 🌟 Proposed Solution
<!-- How would you like this to work? Describe the behavior or UI/UX change. -->


## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why is your proposal better? -->


## 🤝 Community Alignment
<!-- How does this feature serve the autism and neurodiversity community?
     Does it improve safety, accessibility, or support quality? -->


## 📎 Additional Context
<!-- Add any mockups, references, links, or examples that help explain the idea. -->


---
> 📌 Remember: before submitting a PR for this feature, wait for a maintainer
> to approve this issue and assign it to you. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
